Author: XeldarAlz
Name: PVP Auto LB
Description: Fires your job's PvP Limit Break when an enemy's HP drops below a configurable threshold (percent of max HP, or absolute value). Optionally auto-selects the lowest-HP hostile in range when no manual target is set. Defensive/support LBs (e.g. Phalanx, Primal Scream) are recognized and skipped. Commands: /pvpautolb, /pvpautolb config, /palb.
Punchline: Auto-fires your PvP Limit Break at low-HP enemies.
